title: nephrolepis cisneiriana var. pectinata
intro: Nephrolepis cisneiriana var. pectinata, commonly known as the Nephrolepis fern or Lady fern, is a variety of the Nephrolepis fern species, which is a type of evergreen fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrolepis cisneiriana var. pectinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
